title: Saldo - Credit & Collections Management for Your Business
hero_title: Manage your business debts with ease
hero_subtitle: Keep track of who owes you, how much they owe, and when they pay. The ultimate tool for managing your credit sales.
preview_title: Manage your credit sales from anywhere
preview_description: With Saldo, you can easily manage your credit sales anytime, anywhere, right from your phone.
features_title: Everything you need in the palm of your hand
features_subtitle: Designed specifically for small businesses and entrepreneurs.
feature_clients_desc: Register your customers with their contact information and set personalized credit limits.
feature_debts_desc: Add credit sales in seconds. Keep a detailed history of every transaction and payment.
feature_reminders_desc: Set local notifications so you never forget an important collection.
sync_description: Your data is always with you. Saldo works perfectly without an internet connection and automatically syncs to the cloud when you're back online.
security_description: We use world-class infrastructure (Firebase) to ensure your information is always backed up and available across multiple devices.
plans_title: Choose the perfect plan for your business
plan_annual_save: Save compared to the monthly plan
plans_disclaimer: * Prices may vary by region. Check Google Play for the exact price in your country.
footer_description: Simplifying credit and debt management for businesses around the world.
legal_loading_message: Your browser blocks loading local files. Please use a local web server or upload the files to GitHub Pages for testing.
